mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rag_consumed_event ( consumer_name, message_id, message_type, idempotency_key, job_id, progress_sequence, status, error_message ) VALUES ( #{consumerName}, #{messageId}, #{messageType}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{jobId}, #{progressSequence}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'CONSUMED'), #{errorMessage} ) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
